ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: basmati rice (38%),chicken breast(36%),green peas(9%),peanut butter (4%)(contains peanuts), satay sauce (4%)(contains soy, peanuts, crustacea(prawn)), coconut cream(2%), onion(2%), sweet soy sauce(1%)(contains soy,gluten(wheat)), coconut milk powder (0.5%) (contains milk), garlic(0.5%), ginger(0.5%), chicken stock powder(0.5%)(contains flavour enhancer (635)), palm sugar(0.5%), fish sauce(<1%)(contains fish(anchovy)), cornflour(<1%), salt(<1%),pepper(<1%), curry powder(<1%)(contains gluten (wheat,barley,oats)).
product_name: Satay Chicken With Basmati Rice & Green Peas
